HOME.DESCRIPTION: Distribute expenses among party participants based on their consumption.
HOME.ABOUT_DESCRIPTION: This page is including some instructions what you can do on this website
HOME.STEP_2: 2. Click the "Add expenses" button and enter the required data.
HOME.STEP_3: 3. Click the button with a list image, to enter data about the items to be calculated.
HOME.STEP_4: 4. On the next page, add checks, which are used to group items by who paid for them.
HOME.STEP_5: 5. Open the appropriate check and add the items of this check.
HOME.STEP_6: 6. Use the edit and delete buttons to change data if it was entered incorrectly.
HOME.STEP_7: 7. Click the button with a calculator image, to calculate the expenses between the participants.
HOME.STEP_8: 8. Switch between tabs to see how much every participant spent on the party.
HOME.STEP_9: 9. On the "Transaction list" tab you can see how much money each participant owes to the people who paid for the party.

LOGIN.TITLE: Log in
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Use a local account to log in.

ERRORS.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
ERRORS.PASSWORD_REQUIRES_DIGIT: Password must contain at least one digit.
ERRORS.PASSWORD_REQUIRES_UPPERCASE: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
ERRORS.PASSWORD_REQUIRES_LOWERCASE: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
ERRORS.PASSWORD_REQUIRES_SPECIAL: Password must contain at least one special character.

EXPENSES.TITLE: Expenses List
EXPENSES.NO_SEARCH_RESULTS: No data found for this search.

MODAL.PARTICIPANTS_HINT: *Enter participant names, separated by commas (e.g. John, Mary, Alex)

TOAST.CREATE_SUCCESS: Expenses for the selected day have been created.
TOAST.CREATE_ERROR: We couldn't create the expenses. Please check your input and try again.
TOAST.EDIT_SUCCESS: Expenses for the selected day were updated successfully.
TOAST.EDIT_ERROR: Unable to edit expenses. Please review your input and try again.
TOAST.DELETE_ERROR: Deleting expenses failed. Please try once more.
TOAST.SHARE_ERROR: Sharing expenses failed. Please try once more.

BACKEND_ERRORS.UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to perform this action.
BACKEND_ERRORS.ALREADY_SHARED: This expense is already shared with this user.
